completed_features.description: User can sign up with email and password

completed_features.notes: Login works but forgot-password flow not implemented

routes_or_screens.description: Sign up form with email/password validation

how_to_run.ios: xcodebuild -scheme AppName -destination 'platform=iOS Simulator,name=iPhone 16 Pro' build && xcrun simctl install booted build/Build/Products/Debug-iphonesimulator/AppName.app && xcrun simctl launch booted com.example.AppName

known_issues: Forgot-password flow not yet implemented (out of scope for sprint 1)
example.self_eval_notes: Build succeeds, all routes render, no console errors. Login/signup tested manually.

previous_eval_issues_addressed.fix: Fixed session endpoint to return user.name correctly
